data.name: Hide or Sex
data.detailed_description:
“Hide or Sex” In our new game, you must be ready to survive the love that your adventure companions want to give you. With awesome 2D animation, this is a must play!

After a great party, your adventure companions have become very affectionate with you. Now you must escape from the castle before they capture you. The gameplay is on rails where you must pay attention to your opponent's gaze; your steps must be secure, or your companion will give you the punishment you deserve.



What you can find in the game:
• 4 enemies, can you survive this night?.
• Beautiful pictures and animations. 16 animations.
• Incredible sound and visual effects.

data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 日文, 俄文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: WINDOWS® 10
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3 Series or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 500 Series or AMD Radeon™ HD6000 Series (VRAM 1GB) or better
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
